note: Asking-price stats for NON-RARE (white/magic) listings, per base and ilvl band (<80 / 80-81 / 82+, the T1-mod thresholds). Corrupted listings excluded (corruption ends crafting). Magic entries keyed '<base> (magic)'. Belts break down by rolled charm slots. Value here is base identity + ilvl + quality + implicit + chance-bait EV -- the segment the mod equation cannot price.
